title: Automated Technical Writing
scenario: Write a technical article about the concept of object-oriented programming (OOP) in a programming language. The output should be a well-structured and informative article with proper formatting.
constraints: Must include a definition of OOP.
Must include examples of inheritance and polymorphism.
Must include a conclusion with a summary.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the markdown is valid and properly formatted.
Check if the article is accurate and informative.
Verify that the output meets all specified constraints.
